_doc: Unstable (UST) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/ust.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 60C / 60U / 35R / 10M. Collation: sequential, ~50-card runs (10x10 sheets, top/bottom halves). Occasional foil (1:67) modelled by folding foil odds into one common slot. Notes: Silver-border 'Un-' set. Composition also includes 45 contraptions, five basic lands, and one special black-bordered card; some cards have multiple variations. Mythic count (10) matches small sets prior to Oath of the Gatewatch. Printed in USA. 36 packs per box.

draft.tagline: 8 commons · 3 uncommons · 1× rare/mythic · 1 basic land · foil 1:67
